llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 6.899103373692976e-103 A at 0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V, spanning about 97.43 decades.
The smallest listed |I| values are near the lowest |V| values: 8.897350992969297e-103 A at -0.1 V and 6.899103373692976e-103 A at 0.1 V.

On the positive side, |I| increases overall from 6.899103373692976e-103 A at 0.1 V to 2.2494143112878067e-05 A at 6.0 V, but adjacent points fluctuate, for example 9.62893587930369e-09 A at 2.25 V then 8.279256709853086e-09 A at 2.3 V.

At matched |V| values, the two sides are close in magnitude, for example at |V| = 6 V: 2.3994540300343092e-05 A (-6 V) versus 2.2494143112878067e-05 A (+6 V), and at |V| = 1 V: 6.6186841031785665e-15 A (-1 V) versus 7.82976992891886e-15 A (+1 V).
ln(|I|/V^2) remains negative throughout the table, from about -14.22 near |V| = 6 V to about -230.63 at 0.1 V.
